title: View or share single item?
excerpt:
I’m wondering whether it’s possible to share a single item with someone. Doesn’t have to be a guest, can be a member of the same organisation. Is this possible without the Enterprise permissions options? 
So for clarity,…

posts.author: reinhardts (Reinhardt Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m wondering whether it’s possible to share a single item with someone. Doesn’t have to be a guest, can be a member of the same organisation. Is this possible without the Enterprise permissions options?

So for clarity, I want someone to only see the items on a board that have been made available to them. Can this be done?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @reinhardts - This is not available yet, but is in development. From what I understand, when it is released it is planned as an Enterprise feature.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @reinhardts, just wanted to confirm what @PolishedGeek said This feature is in development (it’s not available yet) and will be Enterprise-only.

Happy to talk through your workflow more! Feel free to write to us at support@monday.com and we can try to brainstorm some workarounds.
